fieldValues.value: Root container membership ids resolve in the authoritative instance set

Every id in the root container's rootInstanceIds and memberInstanceIds MUST resolve to a member of the repository's authoritative instance set. The manifest instanceIndex is the cache of that set (RFC-012 R6), not an independent authority. This is the root-container specialization of core Invariant 21, stated separately so the required-root-container guarantee is self-contained.
